zh.lifeSummary: 當Bouchard III de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marly, de Feuillarde de Chateue-Basset於1000年7月7日出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦蒙特莫倫希蒙特莫倫希時，他的父親Bouchard II 'le Barbu' de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marlym si Feuillarde, de Château - Bassett25歲，母親Idelinde Chateau-Basset23歲。他至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1047年在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內布格享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bouchard III de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marly, de Feuillarde de Chateue-Basset于1000年7月7日出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦蒙特莫倫希蒙特莫倫希时，他的父亲Bouchard II 'le Barbu' de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marlym si Feuillarde, de Château - Bassett25岁，母亲Idelinde Chateau-Basset23岁。他至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1047年在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內布格享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bouchard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Marcel, Andre, Michel, Normand, Pierre, Cecile, Gilles, Lucien, Alphonse, Jacques, Alain.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Burchard, composed of the elements burg ‘protection’ and hard ‘hard, strong’.

French: in some cases, possibly also a nickname for someone with a big mouth (in either a literal or figurative sense), from bouche ‘mouth’ + the pejorative suffix -ard. Compare Buschor , Bushard , Bushaw , and Bushor .

variants.name: Bushard
meanings: Possibly, in some cases, also an Americanized form of German Buschard (see Bushart 2).

variants.name: Buschor
meanings: Swiss German: probably a Germanized form of French   Bouchard  . Compare   Buschur   and   Bushor  .

variants.name: Bushore
meanings: Americanized form of French Bouchard , reflecting the characteristic Canadian and American French rounding of the -ard ending. Compare Bushor .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Bouchard III de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marly, de Feuillarde de Chateue-Basset was born on 7 July 1000, in Montmorency, Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, his father, Bouchard II 'le Barbu' de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marlym si Feuillarde, de Château - Bassett, was 25 and his mother, Idelinde Chateau-Basset, was 23. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1047, in Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bouchard III de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marly, de Feuillarde de Chateue-Basset est né le 7 juillet 1000, à Montmorency, Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, son père, Bouchard II 'le Barbu' de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marlym si Feuillarde, de Château - Bassett, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Idelinde Chateau-Basset, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1047, à Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bouchard III de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marly, de Feuillarde de Chateue-Basset am 7. Juli 1000 in Montmorency, Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bouchard II 'le Barbu' de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marlym si Feuillarde, de Château - Bassett 25 und seine Mutter Idelinde Chateau-Basset 23. Er hatte mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1047 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bouchard III de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marly, de Feuillarde de Chateue-Basset è nato il il 7 luglio 1000 nel Montmorency, Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Bouchard II 'le Barbu' de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marlym si Feuillarde, de Château - Bassett, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Idelinde Chateau-Basset, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1047, nel Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bouchard III de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marly, de Feuillarde de Chateue-Bassetが1000年7月7日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-ド'オイゼモントモーエンシモントモーエンシで生まれた時，父Bouchard II 'le Barbu' de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marlym si Feuillarde, de Château - Bassettは25歳，母Idelinde Chateau-Bassetは23歳であった。彼は少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1047年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンボウルゴグンで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bouchard III de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marly, de Feuillarde de Chateue-Basset(이)가 1000년 7월 7일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스 몽모렌시 몽모렌시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bouchard II 'le Barbu' de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marlym si Feuillarde, de Château - Bassett(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Idelinde Chateau-Basset(은)는 23세였다. 그는 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1047년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 부르고그니에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bouchard III de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marly, de Feuillarde de Chateue-Basset nasceu em 7 de julho de 1000, em Montmorency, Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Bouchard II 'le Barbu' de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marlym si Feuillarde, de Château - Bassett, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Idelinde Chateau-Basset, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1047, em Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bouchard III de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marly, de Feuillarde de Chateue-Basset родился 7 июля 1000 г. в местности монтморенси, монтморенси, вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Bouchard II 'le Barbu' de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marlym si Feuillarde, de Château - Bassett было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Idelinde Chateau-Basset, 23. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1047 г. в местности бургогн, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bouchard III de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marly, de Feuillarde de Chateue-Basset nació el 7 de julio de 1000, en Montmorency, Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Bouchard II 'le Barbu' de Montmorency, Seigneur d'Ecouen de Marlym si Feuillarde, de Château - Bassett, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Idelinde Chateau-Basset, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1047, en Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 47 años.
